content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1543: The Agreement in the Past

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Yvelines’s eyes brightened. He had never expected to see Shi Yan here. When Shi Yan disappeared mysteriously from the Sea of Annihilation, he guessed that Shi Yan had returned home. At that time, Masha, Adams, and he were extremely disappointed. They weren’t in good moods when they returned to Musing Rain Territory.

After more than one hundred years, he was taking some apprentices for a field trip, which wasn’t in the Sea Domain of Nihility. However, he met Shi Yan by chance. He felt so happy, indeed.

“You’re here, unexpectedly!”

Yvelines’s face brightened. He was moved and suddenly understood it. He looked at the mist and assumed, “You guys were attracted by that great commotion and came here from another territory? It’s strange, indeed. The energy impact from this Wavy River Territory has shattered the territory barrier. Did it happen to your territory too?”

Shi Yan and Zi Yao exchanged looks and smiled. “Yeah, our territory is nearby. Since a corner of the territory wall is torn, we came to check it out. I didn’t expect to meet you guys here.”

Yvelines’s eyes shot strange light. He looked at Shi Yan and Zi Yao as he was startled.

He couldn’t recognize Shi Yan’s and Zi Yao’s realm!

“Is the Heavenly Eye Clan’s territory nearby? I haven’t seen Adams and Masha for a long time. If you don’t mind, can you take me there to meet them?” Shi Yan pondered for a while and then said.

They were eye-catching here. After Yuan Zu had left, this area was going to become a buzzing place, especially when Labitte and Clark were killed, and Neptune, Xiao Lie, and Jia Ni were captured in Zi Yao’s world of divine light. This place was about to attract experts at the level of the Ten Great Territory Ancestor Realm.

He had experienced a bloody battle with Yuan Zu where he had consumed a lot of energy. The energy from Labitte and the others’ deaths was taken in, but he needed time to buffer the energy and refine it.

Similarly, Zi Yao needed time to steady herself and deal with Neptune, Xiao Lie, and Jia Ni.

The Heavenly Eye Clan’s territory was going to be a good stop. Shi Yan had made up his mind.

“Haha, excellent! I think Adams and Masha will be happy when they meet you!”

Yvelines had wished that Shi Yan would come to their territory, so he agreed immediately. He rubbed his chin and contemplated, “You guys don’t want to see more? That terrifying commotion had shattered even planets. I think there was a battle between Territory Ancestor Realm experts.” He was still curious about what was hiding in the thick mist over there.

“If it’s a battle at the Territory Ancestor Realm, we will court death ourselves if we get in there. We shouldn’t get involved.” Shi Yan gave a bitter smile.

Yvelines thought and then said, “Okay, we should go back through the hole on the barrier to our Musing Rain Territory.”

“Master, who are they?” Little Ya’s eyes brightened. Her line of sight switched from Shi Yan to Zi Yao and she said, “This jie-jie is so beautiful. I have never seen anyone more beautiful than her! So stunning!”

After Zi Yao had fused with Hui’s soul and power, her halo couldn’t be concealed. Her glamor could make even women praise her.

Little Ya and the young warriors of the Heavenly Eye Clan acted gingerly when they saw Zi Yao. They acted unnaturally as they both wanted to see her and avoid her eyes. Also, they were afraid that Shi Yan would be enraged too. All of this made them look awkward.

Zi Yao smiled elegantly when she heard Little Ya compliment her. “Girl, you’re pretty too.”

“Oh, she is...?” Yvelines was surprised too. He thought, Not Audrey? Why did he change to another woman?

When he asked that, he saw Shi Yan startle and Zi Yao’s eyes get bright. Zi Yao smiled and looked at Shi Yan as if she was waiting for him to give her a satisfied answer.

“You haven’t confirmed yet?”

Yvelines was embarrassed as he thought he had asked a stupid question.

“Ah,” Shi Yan gave a faint smile. He said nothing about their relationship. As Little Ye and the other men of the Heavenly Eye Clan were watching with envious eyes, he wrapped his arm around Zi Yao’s delicate waist.

Zi Yao’s eyes looked happy. She moved with the flow, leaning against his torso and feeling great. “I really like you, girl. Do you cultivate Fire power Upanishad? Take this little toy as a gift for you.”

She walked to Little Ya gracefully. While the little girl of the Heavenly Eye Clan was surprised, she shoved a heart-shaped, red crystal into her hand.

The heart-shape crystal had a dancing crimson flame with consciousness.

Little Ya’s white hand fondled the crystal heart. Instantly, she felt her soul altar immerse in a sea of rolling fire. A pure flame directly seeped towards her God power Ancient Tree. She could hear the igniting sound when the red energy flooded in her like a rising tide.

“AH!”

Little Ya was frightened. She hastily threw the crystal heart away. Instantly, the red crystal heart emitted heat waves that filled the entire place and scared Yvelines, turning him pale.

Little Ya was young and she didn’t have a wide knowledge. Yvelines, of course, understood how precious that heart-shaped crystal was.

He clumsily urged his power to cover that little red crystal. He checked it and became shocked. He looked at Zi Yao with fear and said respectfully. “This thing is too precious. Please take it back. Little Ya isn’t worth receiving such a precious item.”

The energy in this small crystal had frightened him. He didn’t know what it was but he knew it was precious!

Zi Yao smiled and looked at Shi Yan.

Shi Yan knew that the precious treasure in Yvelines’s eyes was just a plain item in Zi Yao’s eyes. He grinned and said, “Take it for the girl. Of course, she can’t absorb the energy in that crystal right away. However, it can accelerate her God power accumulating speed by ten times. Even when she reaches the Immortal Realm, she won’t be able to absorb all the energy in it.”

Hearing him, Yvelines’s hand, which was holding the crystal heart, quivered.

Little Ya was bewildered. The other members of the Heavenly Eye Clan were also skeptical as they didn’t know if Shi Yan told them the truth.

It was just a small crystal but the energy it stored could help Little Ya until she reached the Immortal Realm. Was it really that precious?

Also, if it was really that precious, why would she give it away easily like that?

Was it just a simple item in their eyes?

A series of doubts wound around the hearts of the Heavenly Eye Clan members. As they didn’t have high echelons, they didn’t dare to question the others. They just looked bewilderedly.

Yvelines pondered for a while and then received the crystal. He thanked Zi Yao so many times and then guided them towards the crack on the territory barrier.

Through the cracks on the territory barrier, Shi Yan and Zi Yao had entered the territory where the Heavenly Eye Clan dwelled. As soon as they got in there, the torn part on the territory barrier mended magically inside the space energy ripples.

Of course, the members of the Heavenly Eye Clan didn’t know anything.

Musing Rain Territory wasn’t really big. Shi Yan’s Soul Consciousness reached out and covered half of the territory quickly. He had observed many life stars to know the generation situations of this territory.

“I’m taking you to the teleport formation to jump to our holy land. Masha and Adams are there!”

After Yvelines had received the flaming crystal, he was somehow afraid of Shi Yan and Zi Yao. He led them to the nearest teleport formation. Along the way, he was so gingerly.

He found that he couldn’t see through Shi Yan. He wasn’t confident to remind the man of the agreement they had made in the past.

He was afraid that Shi Yan would deny him.

Along the way, Little Ya and Little Ye had murmured with the other young warriors of the Heavenly Eye Clan. They were so curious about Shi Yan and Zi Yao as they made guesses about their realm and cultivation base.

Most of them thought that Shi Yan and Zi Yao were at First Sky of Immortal Realm. Little Ye made a risky guess: the two of them had reached Second Sky of Immortal Realm

Swoosh!

White halos expanded as the teleport formation was activated. It had teleported them through dozens of planets directly to the holy land of the Heavenly Eye Clan.

The Heavenly Eye Star looked like a realistic eye, though. It was the holy land of the Heavenly Eye Clan where generations of their race had dwelled, cultivated, and worshipped their ancestors.

The spirit Qi on this planet wasn’t thin. The vast forest occupied three-fourths of the planet. The rest of the land had many lakes that were all crystal clear. The water in the lake was so fresh and clean that they could drink it directly.

Many cities, big and small, were situated in the forest. The warriors of the Heavenly Eye Clan were moving in and out, some of them flying in the sky.

There were seven big, crystal-like lakes in the Southwest part of this planet. It was the Heavenly Eye Clan’s holy land where they made many big statues. The vertical eyes on the forehead of the statues all opened and released a five-colored divine light. Those were the statues of the former experts who had made a great contribution to the clan.

Shi Yan saw a new statue around ten meters made of some blue stone stood there. Surprisingly, it was Yvelines.

Many warriors of the Heavenly Eye Clan were standing at the foot of the statue, bowing to show their respect.

“Not bad, your fellows made you a statue,” Shi Yan teased him after landing.

“Ah, it’s embarrassing,” said Yvelines reluctantly.

“My teacher has helped our Heavenly Eye Clan establish the alliance with the Mysterious Sky Clan. It’s his merit that we can depend on the strong Mysterious Sky Clan. With his great contribution to the clan, our Chief and the elders agreed that he was qualified to receive the worshiping from our fellows.”

One of Yvelines’s apprentice explained, his face red. He had considered Yvelines his proud teacher for more than one hundred years.

Shi Yan just smiled and walked through the lines of statues as he thought that it was interesting.

Zi Yao walked shoulder by shoulder with him.

Yvelines became more embarrassed. More than anyone else, he knew that the Heavenly Eye Clan could depend on the Mysterious Sky Clan because Tu Shi Qi and Ya Yun had considered Shi Yan’s face. Otherwise, the Heavenly Eye Clan wasn’t eligible to become a clan under the Mysterious Sky Clan.
